minimal.notes: Smallest footprint that still gives reliable AF for SNV and SV.

default.notes: Recommended for routine human mapping including paralog-rich loci.

research_full.notes: All catalogs. Use for variant-discovery research where false novelty is expensive.

notes: All catalogs are GRCh38-coordinate by default. CHM13v2 prior files can be derived by lifting over via the t2t-chm13 chain file from UCSC; ingestion command in each source spec accepts --liftover-chain for that purpose.
